title: Google Drive Receipt OCR → Google Sheets Pipeline
goal: Auto-detect new receipt images/PDFs in a watched Google Drive folder, OCR them using Claude vision, extract Irish Revenue-compliant fields itemized per line, and append to a Google Sheet for later ledger categorisation.

references: Revenue eBrief No. 025/21 — VAT Invoicing Rules
Value-Added Tax Consolidation Act 2010 s.86 (simplified invoice threshold < €100 incl. VAT)
Revenue Guide IT70 — Record-keeping obligations for sole traders
regulatory_compliance.simplified_invoice_note: Till receipts under €100 incl. VAT require only: date, description, total, VAT rate. Flag these with receipt_type=simplified.
regulatory_compliance.currency: EUR assumed; capture explicitly if multi-currency

sheet_schema.note: One row per LINE ITEM. Header fields (supplier, date, totals) repeated on each row for ledger compatibility.

acceptance_criteria: New image/PDF dropped in target Drive folder triggers pipeline within 60 seconds
OCR extracts all Revenue-required fields; missing mandatory fields flagged in status column
Each line item gets its own row — no merged cells, no comma-separated items in one cell
Receipt image Drive shareable URL stored on every row
Duplicate file IDs rejected — same receipt never creates duplicate rows
Simplified invoices (< €100) accepted with reduced field set, receipt_type = simplified
Failures write status=ERROR + notes column explaining what went wrong
Manual re-trigger available: re-drop same file → system detects via file ID, skips if already processed
Sheet tab auto-created per calendar year: Receipts_2026, Receipts_2027 etc.
End-to-end test with 5 sample receipts (itemized, simplified, PDF, poor quality, non-receipt) all handled correctly

missing_muscles.name: muscle_gdrive_watcher
missing_muscles.purpose: Poll a Google Drive folder for new files since last run. Returns list of new file dicts {id, name, mimeType, webViewLink, createdTime}.
missing_muscles.outputs: JSON array of new file objects or empty array
missing_muscles.api: Google Drive API v3 — files.list with query 'parents in FOLDER_ID and createdTime > LAST_RUN'
missing_muscles.build_notes: Use service account credentials JSON for headless operation. Store last_run timestamp in state file. Idempotent — safe to re-run.

missing_muscles.name: muscle_ocr_receipt
missing_muscles.purpose: Download a file from Google Drive, pass to Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 vision, return structured JSON of receipt fields.
missing_muscles.outputs: JSON: {receipt_id, receipt_type, invoice_date, supplier_name, supplier_address, supplier_vat_reg_no, invoice_number, lines:[{line_no, description, qty, unit_price_ex_vat, vat_rate_pct, vat_amount, line_total_inc_vat}], subtotal_ex_vat, total_vat, total_inc_vat, currency, ocr_confidence, image_url}
missing_muscles.api: Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 vision via messages API. System prompt enforces Irish Revenue field extraction.
missing_muscles.build_notes: Download file bytes first, encode as base64. Use claude-sonnet-4-6 model. Prompt must instruct model to return ONLY valid JSON. Wrap in try/except — if JSON parse fails, return {status: ERROR}. Handle PDF by converting first page to image via pdf2image or fitz.

missing_muscles.name: muscle_sheets_append
missing_muscles.purpose: Append one or more rows to a named Google Sheet tab. Creates the tab if it does not exist.
missing_muscles.api: Google Sheets API v4 — spreadsheets.values.append, spreadsheets.batchUpdate (for tab creation)
missing_muscles.build_notes: Validate column count matches sheet header before appending. If tab missing, create it and write header row from SHEET_SCHEMA constant.

missing_muscles.name: muscle_receipt_dedup
missing_muscles.purpose: Check if a Drive file ID has already been processed. Reads/writes a local SQLite dedup ledger.
missing_muscles.api: SQLite via stdlib sqlite3. Table: processed_receipts(file_id TEXT PK, processed_at TEXT, receipt_id TEXT)
missing_muscles.build_notes: action=check returns already_processed flag. action=mark inserts record. Atomic via SQLite transactions.

missing_muscles.name: muscle_gdrive_download
missing_muscles.purpose: Download a single file from Google Drive to a local temp path. Handles both native Google files (export) and binary files.
missing_muscles.api: Google Drive API v3 — files.get (metadata) + files.get(alt=media) for download
missing_muscles.build_notes: For Google Docs/Sheets export as PDF. For images/PDFs do direct download. Clean up temp files after OCR completes.

n8n_workflow.name: BERM — Receipt OCR Pipeline
n8n_workflow.trigger: Schedule trigger every 5 minutes OR Google Drive trigger (webhook) on new file in watched folder

nodes.name: Drive Watcher
nodes.note: Get new files since last run

nodes.name: Loop Files
nodes.note: Process one file at a time

nodes.name: Build Rows
nodes.note: Expand line items into flat row array with all header fields repeated

nodes.name: Sheets Append
nodes.note: Write to year tab e.g. Receipts_2026

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.note: Write failed file ID + error to Receipts_ERRORS tab

test_plan.test_env: Dedicated Google Drive test folder: /Receipts/TEST_INBOX. Dedicated Sheet: Receipt_Ledger_TEST

test_cases.description: Full Irish VAT invoice — itemized, multiple lines
test_cases.input: Clear photo of itemized restaurant or hardware store receipt with VAT number
test_cases.expected: All Revenue-required fields extracted; one row per line item; image_url present; status=OK
test_cases.pass_criteria: supplier_vat_reg_no extracted and matches IE format (IE + 8 chars)

test_cases.input: Supermarket or petrol station receipt without VAT reg number
test_cases.expected: receipt_type=simplified; reduced field set captured; no error raised for missing VAT reg

test_cases.input: Emailed PDF invoice dropped into Drive folder
test_cases.expected: PDF first page converted to image; OCR runs; data extracted same as photo
test_cases.pass_criteria: Row written with all fields; mime_type=application/pdf handled

test_cases.input: Deliberately blurry phone photo of receipt
test_cases.expected: Partial extraction; ocr_confidence=low; status=PARTIAL; notes column explains missing fields
test_cases.pass_criteria: Row written (not skipped); status!=ERROR unless completely unreadable

test_cases.expected: OCR returns {status: NOT_A_RECEIPT}; row written to ERRORS tab only; not appended to main ledger
test_cases.pass_criteria: Main Receipts tab unchanged; error tab has one new row

test_cases.input: Same receipt dropped into folder a second time
test_cases.expected: Dedup check catches it; pipeline skips; no duplicate rows in sheet
test_cases.pass_criteria: Sheet row count unchanged; no new row

test_cases.input: Mixed receipt with 23% and 13.5% items (e.g. food + alcohol)
test_cases.expected: Each line has correct vat_rate_pct; totals reconcile across rates
test_cases.pass_criteria: Lines with 23% have vat_rate_pct=23; lines with 13.5% have vat_rate_pct=13.5

test_cases.expected: Written to Receipts_2027 tab; tab auto-created with correct headers
test_cases.pass_criteria: Receipts_2026 tab unchanged; Receipts_2027 exists with correct schema

test_plan.acceptance_sign_off: All TC-01 through TC-07 must pass. TC-08 can be verified by date-setting test. No data loss on TC-04/05/06.

credentials_needed: Google Service Account JSON with Drive (read) + Sheets (write) scopes
Anthropic API key (for Claude vision OCR)
estimated_scope: Large (6-10 hours total: 4 muscles × ~1.5h each + n8n workflow + testing)
phase: 1 — OCR pipeline only (no categorisation, no ledger push)
